channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Commonwealth Secretary General reaffirms support for Tanzania's political reforms and national dialogue
item.description: The Commonwealth has strongly reaffirmed its full support for Tanzania's ongoing efforts to build a stable, inclusive, and credible political environment. This came through a message from Commonwealth...

item.title: Parliament Introduces Bill to Temporarily Cut VAT on Fuel from 16% to 8%
item.description: In Nairobi, the National Assembly has started the process of looking at a new Bill that aims to reduce the cost of fuel for Kenyans. Majority Leader Kimani Ichungwah introduced the Value Added Tax Ame...

item.title: INEC Chairman Joash Amupitan to Deliver Keynote at Stakeholders Policy Dialogue on Electoral Reforms
item.description: The Chairman of the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC), Professor Joash Amupitan, go deliver the keynote address at a high-level policy dialogue wey dey focus on electoral reforms for Ni...

item.title: Pakistan and Saudi Arabia extend $3 billion deposit to support external reserves
item.description: Pakistan and Saudi Arabia signed an agreement on Friday to extend the maturity of a $3 billion deposit placed by the Saudi Fund for Development with the State Bank of Pakistan. The signing ceremony to...

item.title: Apple's Extensive R&D Presence and Acquisitions in Israel's Tech Sector
item.description: Apple maintains deep technological connections with Israel, highlighted by its second-largest research and development center worldwide in Tel Aviv, employing around 2,500 people. This facility has co...

item.title: Government urged to ban resale of concert tickets above face value
item.description: Fans and industry figures have called on the UK government to introduce legislation preventing the resale of concert tickets above their original face value. Reports indicate that many music enthusias...

item.title: Canterbury University Study Finds Vaping Chemicals Likely Carcinogenic Based on Animal Data and Chemical Analysis
item.description: A new study from the University of Canterbury, published in the New Zealand Medical Journal, analyzed the chemical composition of vape aerosol and assessed its potential cancer risk by comparing it wi...

item.title: Meghan Trainor clarifies limited role in social group controversy and expresses concern for others
item.description: Meghan Trainor has addressed the recent controversy surrounding a celebrity social circle, often referred to as a “toxic mom group,” following an essay by Ashley Tisdale. Tisdale described her negativ...

item.title: Euphoria Season 3 Debuts to Strong Viewership After Four-Year Gap
item.description: After a four-year hiatus, HBO's hit series 'Euphoria' returned on April 12 with a strong premiere, attracting 8.5 million viewers across all platforms in its first three days, marking the show's most ...

item.title: EU Launches Open-Source Age Verification App to Enforce Online Child Protection Rules
item.description: The European Commission has introduced a new open-source age verification app designed to help enforce age restrictions across online platforms, particularly social media and adult websites. Announced...

item.title: Foreign Office chief exits after failure to disclose Mandelson vetting concerns
item.description: The UK’s most senior civil servant at the Foreign Office, Sir Olly Robbins, is set to leave his post after a major controversy involving the vetting of Lord Peter Mandelson as ambassador to the United...

item.title: Trump indicates possible visit to Islamabad following potential Iran peace deal
item.description: US President Donald Trump has expressed optimism over a potential agreement with Iran, stating that if a deal is signed in Islamabad, he may personally visit Pakistan. He praised Pakistan's leadership...

item.title: Nigeria: Opportunities for Domain Investment and Potential High Returns
item.description: A concerning report highlights the widespread lack of diagnosis and inadequate treatment for haemophilia in Nigeria, impacting countless individuals and families. The article details the challenges fa...

item.title: Tinubu’s Aide Criticises Atiku’s ARISE TV Interview, Says He Showed No Clear Policy Direction For 2027
item.description: The Special Adviser on Media and Public Communication to President Bola Tinubu, Sunday Dare, don blast former Vice President Atiku Abubakar after his recent interview wey show for ARISE Television. Ac...

item.title: Four paramedics killed in repeated Israeli strikes on rescue teams in southern Lebanon
item.description: Four paramedics have been killed and six others wounded in a series of Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon, according to Lebanese authorities, who allege that rescue teams were deliberately targete...

item.title: Pastor Kanyari Explains He Does Not Fight for Custody of His Children with Late Betty Bayo, Highlights Providing School Fees and a KSh 90 Million Mansion
item.description: Following the death of gospel musician Betty Bayo, questions arose about the custody of her two children, Sky and Danny, whom she had with controversial preacher Pastor Victor Kanyari. After her passi...

item.title: Cuba Maintains Preparedness Amidst Rising US-Cuba Tensions
item.description: According to President Miguel Diaz-Canel, Cuba is geared up and prepared for a potential attack from the United States. This stance comes amidst escalating tensions following President Trump's continu...

item.title: Daily Mail's America 250 Power List ranks Donald Trump as the most influential man in the United States
item.description: According to an exclusive poll conducted by JL Partners for Daily Mail+, Donald Trump has been named the most powerful and influential man in America ahead of the nation's 250th anniversary. The surve...

item.title: Tanzania Implements Digital Mineral Licensing System for Increased Efficiency
item.description: Sasa hivi, Tanzania inaingia kwenye mabadiliko makubwa kuhusu jinsi inavyotoa leseni za uchimbaji madini. Serikali imechukua uamuzi wa kutumia mfumo wa digital kabisa, ambao utaautomatisha mchakato mz...

item.title: Alden Richards launches campaign to highlight community heroes
item.description: ABS-CBN celebrity Alden Richards has initiated a project aimed at recognizing and promoting community heroes who make significant contributions to society. Through this advocacy, Richards hopes to ins...
